zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw於大約1077年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，她的父親Hoedlyw ap Ithel27歲，母親Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel24歲。她和Gronwy ab Owain至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1177年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw于大约1077年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾时，她的父亲Hoedlyw ap Ithel27岁，母亲Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel24岁。她和Gronwy ab Owain至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1177年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw was born about 1077, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hoedlyw ap Ithel, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, was 24. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Gronwy ab Owain. She died in 1177, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw est née environ 1077, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hoedlyw ap Ithel, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Gronwy ab Owain. Elle est décédée en 1177, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw um 1077 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hoedlyw ap Ithel 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel 24. Sie hatte mit Gronwy ab Owain mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1177 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw è nata il circa 1077 nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hoedlyw ap Ithel, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Gronwy ab Owain. Morì nel 1177, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlywが約1077年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hoedlyw ap Ithelは27歳，母Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithelは24歳であった。彼女はGronwy ab Owainとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1177年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw(이)가 대략 1077년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hoedlyw ap Ithel(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Gronwy ab Owain(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1177년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw nasceu aproximadamente 1077, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hoedlyw ap Ithel, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Gronwy ab Owain. Ela faleceu em 1177, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw родилась около 1077 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hoedlyw ap Ithel было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Gronwy ab Owain. Она умерла в 1177 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw nació aproximadamente 1077, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hoedlyw ap Ithel, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Hoedlyw ap Ithel, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Gronwy ab Owain. Murió en 1177, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 101 años.
